dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Jinwoo had been searching for an affordable apartment for months. The city was ruthless, and his wallet, even more so.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Then, he found it. A small studio, surprisingly spacious for its price, in an older building.

dialogue.speaker: LANDLORD
dialogue.line: Just sign here, and here. First month's rent and deposit, please.

dialogue.speaker: JINWOO
dialogue.line: (Thinking) This is almost too good to be true. The landlord was a bit... eager.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RATTLE

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The next day, Jinwoo moved in. The apartment was simple, but clean. Everything seemed fine, until he entered the bathroom.

dialogue.speaker: JINWOO
dialogue.line: (Thinking) Whoa. That's... quite a mirror.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Dominating the small bathroom wall was an antique, full-length mirror with an ornate, dark wood frame. It was far too grand for the space.

dialogue.speaker: JINWOO
dialogue.line: (Thinking) Well, at least I won't have to buy one. It's a bit creepy, but functional.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SPLASH

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Days turned into a week. Jinwoo settled into his new routine. The mirror became just another fixture.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: BRUSH-BRUSH

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: One evening, as he brushed his teeth, he noticed something odd.

dialogue.speaker: JINWOO
dialogue.line: (Thinking) Did my reflection just... blink slower than me?

dialogue.speaker: JINWOO
dialogue.line: Nah, must be tired. Long day.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He shook his head, dismissing it. But the feeling lingered.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DRIP... DRIP...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The next morning, while shaving, he saw it again. A fleeting shadow behind his reflection, in the corner of his eye. But when he turned, nothing was there.

dialogue.speaker: JINWOO
dialogue.line: (Thinking) What the hell? Am I seeing things?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He started to feel uneasy around the mirror. Its ornate frame seemed to watch him.

dialogue.speaker: JINWOO
dialogue.line: (Thinking) Maybe I should just cover it up. It's too big anyway.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He found an old sheet and draped it over the mirror. Immediately, a strange chill filled the room.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RUSTLE

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Later that night, he woke to a soft scratching sound coming from the bathroom.

dialogue.speaker: JINWOO
dialogue.line: (Thinking) What's that noise?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SCRAPE... SCRAPE...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He slowly approached the bathroom door. The scratching grew louder, more insistent.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CREAK

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He pushed the door open slightly. The sheet was gone. The mirror stood exposed, reflecting the dimly lit bathroom.

dialogue.speaker: JINWOO
dialogue.line: (Thinking) No... I covered it!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He stared at his reflection. It was him, but not quite. The eyes were too wide, the smile too slow to form.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUMP-THUMP (heartbeat)

dialogue.speaker: JINWOO'S REFLECTION
dialogue.line: Come closer, Jinwoo...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The voice wasn't spoken, but echoed directly in his mind. His reflection's hand slowly lifted, palm pressed against the glass.

dialogue.speaker: JINWOO
dialogue.line: (Thinking) This isn't real. It can't be real!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He stumbled backward, fear seizing him. His reflection's smile widened, revealing too many teeth.

dialogue.speaker: JINWOO'S REFLECTION
dialogue.line: Don't you want to see what's on the other side?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The mirror's surface rippled like water. His reflection's hand reached out, phasing through the glass, its fingers stretching towards him.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RIPPLING

dialogue.speaker: JINWOO
dialogue.line: GET AWAY FROM ME!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He screamed, turning and scrambling out of the apartment, not bothering to grab anything. He didn't stop running until the building was a distant blur.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Back in the empty apartment, the mirror reflected the silent bathroom. Then, a slow, knowing smirk spread across the reflection's face.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SMIRK

summary: Jinwoo moves into a suspiciously cheap apartment and soon discovers that the antique mirror in his bathroom holds a sinister secret. His reflection begins to act independently, eventually attempting to pull him into its distorted reality, forcing Jinwoo to flee in terror.
